title: 1,000+ Tokens/Sec: Google Just Shattered the AI Speed Limit (DiffusionGemma)
summary: Google DeepMind's DiffusionGemma applies image-generation diffusion techniques to text generation using uniform state diffusion across multiple bidirectional passes. The model achieves over 1,000 tokens per second on H100 GPUs by shifting inference from memory-bound to compute-bound, with practical benchmarks tested on code generation tasks.
writeup: Better Stack covers DiffusionGemma, Google DeepMind's application of image-generation diffusion methods to text, using uniform state diffusion across multiple bidirectional passes rather than left-to-right autoregression. The core result: over 1,000 tokens per second on H100 GPUs, achieved by moving inference from memory-bound to compute-bound. The video tests the approach on code generation benchmarks, making it relevant for anyone tracking diffusion-based alternatives to autoregressive decoding.
